'''zagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oblately|oblately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oblately|oblately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zagate|zagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zagatesher|zagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagatesherĂ«m|zagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zagatero|zagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zagateshĂ«|zagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagateshĂ«m|zagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizagatero|gokizagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizagateshĂ«|gokizagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagateshĂ«m|gokizagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozagankerom|gozagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozagankeshĂ«|gozagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagankeshĂ«m|gozagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozagankeya|gozagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zagaterom|zagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagatemu|zagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zagateya|zagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizagaterom|gokizagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagatemu|gokizagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizagateya|gokizagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zagagate|zagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zagagatesher|zagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagagatesherĂ«m|zagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zagagatero|zagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zagagateshĂ«|zagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagagateshĂ«m|zagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizagagatero|gokizagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizagagateshĂ«|gokizagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagagateshĂ«m|gokizagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozagagankerom|gozagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozagagankeshĂ«|gozagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozagagankeshĂ«m|gozagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozagagankeya|gozagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zagagaterom|zagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zagagatemu|zagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zagagateya|zagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizagagaterom|gokizagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizagagatemu|gokizagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizagagateya|gokizagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠte|zĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠtesher|zĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠtero|zĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠgĂŠtero|gokizĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠterom|zĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠtemu|zĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠgĂŠteya|zĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠgĂŠterom|gokizĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠgĂŠteya|gokizĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafgafte|zafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafgaftesher|zafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafgaftesherĂ«m|zafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafgaftero|zafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafgafteshĂ«|zafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafgafteshĂ«m|zafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafgaftero|gokizafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafgafteshĂ«|gokizafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafgafteshĂ«m|gokizafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafgafnkerom|gozafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafgafnkeshĂ«|gozafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafgafnkeshĂ«m|gozafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafgafnkeya|gozafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafgafterom|zafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafgaftemu|zafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafgafteya|zafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafgafterom|gokizafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafgaftemu|gokizafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafgafteya|gokizafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
